tree.name: Caleb Martin
tree.tradeDescription: DAL traded Quentin Grimes and a 2025 2nd round pick (Johni Broome) to PHI for Caleb Martin

assetsGivenUp.name: Quentin Grimes
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: DAL traded Tim Hardaway Jr., 2025 2nd (TOR own), and two 2028 2nd round picks (least favorable, MIA own) to DET for Quentin Grimes
assetsGivenUp.note: Houston guard, 2021 #25 pick by NYK, traded to DET, then to DAL

assetsGivenUp.name: Tim Hardaway Jr.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: DAL traded Dennis Smith Jr., DeAndre Jordan, Wesley Matthews, 2021 1st (Keon Johnson #21), and 2024 1st (Kyshawn George #24) to NYK for Kristaps Porzingis, Tim Hardaway Jr., Courtney Lee, and Trey Burke
assetsGivenUp.note: Michigan forward, 2013 #24 pick by NYK. Received by DAL in Porzingis trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Dennis Smith Jr.
assetsGivenUp.note: NC State guard, drafted #9 by Dallas

assetsGivenUp.name: DeAndre Jordan
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent from LA Clippers

assetsGivenUp.name: Wesley Matthews
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent from Portland Trail Blazers

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 1st Round Pick (#21) via DAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Unprotected, conveyed to New York as #21 overall

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 1st Round Pick (#24) via DAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Top-10 protected, did not convey in 2023, rolled to 2024 as #24 overall to New York

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (TOR own)
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to Detroit in Grimes trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick (least favorable)
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to Detroit in Grimes trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick (MIA own)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from SAS in 3-team Grant Williams trade
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally Miami's pick, acquired from San Antonio, sent to Detroit

assetsGivenUp.name: Reggie Bullock
assetsGivenUp.note: UNC wing, signed as free agent. Sent to SAS in Grant Williams 3-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 1st Round Pick Swap via DAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Right to swap 2030 1st, sent to SAS in Grant Williams trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (CHA own)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from CHA as part of 6-team Klay Thompson sign-and-trade, sent to PHI in Caleb Martin trade
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally CHA's pick, acquired July 6 2024 in Klay S&T

assetsGivenUp.name: Josh Green
assetsGivenUp.note: Arizona wing, drafted #18 by Dallas. Sent to Charlotte as part of 6-team Klay Thompson sign-and-trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 2nd Round Pick via DAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Dallas own 2031 2nd round pick, sent to Philadelphia as part of Klay Thompson sign-and-trade
